message:
feat(abi): promote protocol/ether/signal families from host delegation to native

Replace 11 more host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- protocol (6): setprotoent/endprotoent/getprotoent/getprotoent_r/
  getprotobyname_r/getprotobynumber_r — native /etc/protocols parser
  with thread-local iterator and reentrant helpers
- ether (3): ether_ntohost/ether_hostton/ether_line — native /etc/ethers
  parser using existing parse_ether_addr helper
- signal (2): sigpause (raw syscall via sigsuspend), sigstack
  (translated to sigaltstack syscall)

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 44 → 33

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
